MARCHÉE - Ash Blue Spine Distressed Denim Blazer
──────────────────────────────────────────
An avant-garde digital fashion label built on Roblox. Born at the intersection of virtual elegance and modern rebellion, MARCHÉE redefines what fashion means in a world where pixels are the new fabric.

**DISCLAIMER: Due to the wide variety of avatar bodies, complex poses, and the baggy silhouettes of our designs, slight visual glitches or artifacts may occur. Please try before purchase.

items.name: Salt's shoulder
items.description:
Hey! I am salt, this item is a gift to someone who has been helping me. Thank you very much! May you be safe and happy, Shalom. 🕊


We are the world
We are the children
We are the ones who make a brighter day
So, let's start giving

There's a choice we're making
We're saving our own lives
It's true we'll make a better day
Just you and me

items.name: Seraph's Vigil Helmet
items.description: Helmet for Seraph's Vigil set.  Once used by workers in hazardous zones, the Seraph's Vigil helmet, with its detachable respirator, visor, and utility lights, now serves crafty scavengers in the post-apocalypse. Known for its protective features, only those skilled in its upkeep can make full use of its lifesaving potential amidst toxic ruins
